data.title: Avis Budget Group to announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 27, followed by conference call on Oct 28.
data.description: A conference call has been set for October 28th, 2025, to discuss the latest results. This call will be a platform for stakeholders to review and analyze key figures and statistics pertaining to the company's performance. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in this significant event. Mark your calendars for the insightful discussion set to take place on that date.

data.title: Context Therapeutics grants 30,000 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq rule, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on T cell bispecific antibodies for solid tumors.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Context Therapeutics Inc. revealed that the company has issued non-qualified stock options for the purchase of 30,000 shares of its common stock to a recently hired employee. Context, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CNTX, specializes in developing T cell engaging bispecific antibodies tailored for solid tumor treatment. This move was considered essential in attracting the new employee to join the company's workforce.

data.title: Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) to host Q3 2025 financial results webcast on October 27, 2025, in San Jose, California.
data.description: A webcast for Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) will be conducted on Monday, October 27, 2025, to present the financial results for the third quarter of that year.

data.title: Helix Energy Solutions Group (NYSE: HLX) to report Q3 results on Oct 22, 2025, with review on Oct 23 at 9:00 am CT. Website: www.helixesg.com.
data.description: Houston-based company Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX) is set to disclose its third-quarter financial performance for 2025 on Wednesday, October 22, 2025, post market closure. The official communication, including a presentation, will be accessible on Helix's official website, www.helixesg.com. A comprehensive review of the third-quarter results is scheduled for Thursday, October 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time through a teleconference and webcast. Investors and individuals keen on this information can participate in the event.

data.title: MV Oil Trust (NYSE: MVO) announced distribution of $2,357,500 or $0.205 per unit for Q3; Record date: October 15, payment: October 24, 2025.
data.description: MV Oil Trust (NYSE: MVO) declared a Trust distribution of net earnings for the quarterly payment period concluding on September 30, 2025. Shareholders registered on October 15, 2025, will get a payment totaling $2,357,500 or $0.205 per unit, to be paid by October 24, 2025. During this period, the total volume was 142,501 barrels of oil equivalent (BOE) with an average price of $62.08 per BOE, generating gross proceeds of $8,846,255. After deducting costs of $5,628,563, the net profit was $3,217,692.

data.title: Data breach alert: Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigating data privacy claims for Rasevic Companies customers after breach on April 2, 2025.
data.description: A national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, based in Newtown, PA, is currently looking into data privacy allegations surrounding a data breach incident at The Rasevic Companies. The breach came to Rasevic Companies' attention around April 2, 2025. The firm is investigating the claims and seeking further information. The potential breach has raised concerns about the security of personal data involved. Anyone affected or with relevant information is encouraged to come forward for further assessment and potential legal action.

data.title: Bitcoin surges to nearly $124K, misses breaking record. Price hits all-time high for "Uptober", despite U.S. gov't shutdown.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin recently neared reaching a new record high, as the cryptocurrency extended its strong performance at the beginning of "Uptober" amidst the shutdown of the U.S. government.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico reports 0.9% increase in passenger traffic in Sept 2025 vs 2024.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, as of October 3, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP), commonly known as GAP, has released a report on the preliminary terminal passenger traffic statistics for September 2025 in comparison to September 2024.

data.title: Star Bulk Carriers Corp. appoints Mikkel Storm Weum as new Board member for Ship Transportation; also serves in FLEX LNG Ltd.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, on Oct. 03, 2025, Star Bulk Carriers Corp. (Nasdaq: SBLK), a global shipping firm specializing in dry bulk cargo transportation, revealed the appointment of Mr. Mikkel Storm Weum as a Class B director on its Board of Directors. Mr. Weum, an Investment Director at Seatankers Management Norway AS, also holds a position on the board of FLEX LNG Ltd., listed on NYSE.

data.title: Diginex acquires Matter DK ApS for ESG data expertise, enhancing sustainability solutions through AI-driven analytics.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Diginex Limited (NASDAQ: DGNX), a key player in Sustainability RegTech, successfully completed an all-share acquisition of Matter DK ApS (“Matter”), a Danish ESG data firm. This acquisition bolsters Diginex’s expertise in ESG data benchmarking, reporting, and AI-driven analytics, providing more robust solutions for clients managing global sustainability standards. Matter, based in Copenhagen, offers sophisticated tools such as an intuitive analytics platform for assessing sustainability at the portfolio level, adaptable API integrations for platforms like Nasdaq eVestment, and transparent ESG datasets in line with SDGs and regulatory guidelines.

data.title: AGCO Tech Day 2025 in Germany highlights AI, autonomy, and mixed-fleet solutions to boost farmer profits. AGCO Corp showcases cutting-edge tech. #PrecisionAg #AGCO TechDay
data.description: A pioneering leader in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO), is demonstrating cutting-edge precision agriculture technology at its annual Tech Day event in MARKTOBERDORF, Germany. The event, taking place on Sept. 25, 2025, features the most advanced solutions in the industry. AGCO Corporation is highlighting their innovative technology to industry professionals and experts. The event aims to showcase the company's commitment to advancing agricultural practices and introducing new levels of efficiency.

data.title: Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN) will discuss Q3 2025 results on Nov 7, 2025, in a 10:00 a.m. ET conference call.
data.description: A conference call has been scheduled by Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN) for Friday, November 7, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review its financial performance in the third quarter of 2025. The call will include an initial presentation followed by a Q&A session.

data.title: Triumph Financial, Inc. will release Q3 2025 financial results and commentary on Oct 15, 2025, after market close. Visit ir.triumph.io.
data.description: Triumph Financial, Inc. (NYSE: TFIN) based in Dallas, revealed its plan to disclose the third quarter financial results and management commentary on October 15, 2025, after the market closes. The information will be accessible on the Company’s IR website at ir.triumph.io. This announcement is expected to provide important insights into the company's performance and financial standing for the third quarter of 2025. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to review the update to gain a comprehensive understanding of Triumph Financial, Inc.'s recent developments.

data.title: PennantPark Investment Corp (NYSE: PNNT) to release Q4 2025 results on Nov 24 after market close.
data.description: The company, PennantPark Investment Corporation (NYSE: PNNT), disclosed that it is set to release its financial results for the fourth fiscal quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Monday, November 24, 2025, following the conclusion of the financial markets on that day.

data.title: Zeta Global to host Investor Day on October 8th to discuss product roadmap and R&D pipeline. Webcast available at investors.zetaglobal.com.
data.description: Zeta Global (NYSE: ZETA) has revealed plans to conduct an Investor Day on October 8, 2025. The event will feature discussions by the augmented leadership team on Zeta's product roadmap and R&D pipeline. A live webcast and replay of the Investor Day can be accessed on Zeta’s Investor Relations website at http://investors.zetaglobal.com. The content will be available for one year after the event. This initiative is aimed at providing insights on Zeta's growth strategies to stakeholders and interested investors.
